description_long: This is a modern white Mercedes-Benz minivan with a sleek, aerodynamic body and a black roof. The side panels feature a distinctive black graphic of running animals and mountains, adding a unique visual flair. The windows are large and tinted, providing privacy and a premium look, while the alloy wheels are multi-spoked and stylish. The front grille displays the iconic Mercedes-Benz emblem, and the headlights are sharp and contemporary. The rear of the minivan is cleanly designed with horizontal taillights and a wide rear window, suggesting ample cargo space inside.
description: A white Mercedes-Benz minivan with a black roof, tinted windows, and unique animal graphics along the sides. It features stylish alloy wheels and a modern, premium design.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the animal and mountain graphics, large tinted windows, and multi-spoke alloy wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the Mercedes-Benz grille, emblem, and sleek headlights with a panoramic windshield.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with visible graphics, tinted windows, and alloy wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the wide rear window, horizontal taillights, and clean rear design.
attribute_window_configuration: Large front windshield, two large side windows per side, one small rear side window per side, and a wide rear window.
